evals.prompt: I'm building a knowledge curation feature on our Open Social Drupal 10 site (os-knowledge-garden). We need a custom content entity type called KnowledgeResource for organizing external learning resources (articles, papers, tools, documentation) alongside our AI-indexed content. It should have base fields for: related_topic (entity_reference to node), author (entity_reference to user), resource_type (list_string with allowed values: article, research_paper, tool, documentation), and created timestamp. Include all necessary handlers - forms, list builder, access handler, and route provider. Put it in a module called knowledge_resource.
evals.expected_output: A complete content entity type with entity class, base fields, all handlers, and module scaffold that installs and creates entities successfully
expectations: Entity class file exists at src/Entity/KnowledgeResource.php
Entity class has either #[ContentEntityType] attribute (D11) or @ContentEntityType annotation (D10)
resource_type field defines allowed_values with article, research_paper, tool, documentation
Entity handlers include form, list_builder, access handler, and route_provider declarations
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en knowledge_resource returns exit code 0
Entity type is installed: running ddev drush php-eval "echo \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->hasDefinition('knowledge_resource') ? 'installed' : 'missing';" outputs 'installed'

An entity can be created: running ddev drush php-eval "$s = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('knowledge_resource'); $e = $s->create(['resource_type' => 'article']); $e->save(); echo 'id:' . $e->id();" outputs an id without error
E2E: Entity form route is accessible -- navigate to the entity add form path and verify the form renders (page contains form elements, not 404)
